creator: dweimer@dweimer.net
text:
(In reply to timp87 from comment #3)

Odd, when I tried this I got the following

14-Aug 10:59 bacula-dir JobId 3881: shell command: run BeforeJob "env PATH=/usr/local/bin:$PATH /usr/local/share/bacula/make_catalog_backup.pl MyCatalog"
14-Aug 10:59 bacula-dir JobId 3881: BeforeJob: Can't find your catalog (MyCatalog) in director configuration
14-Aug 10:59 bacula-dir JobId 3881: Error: Runscript: BeforeJob returned non-zero status=1. ERR=Child exited with code 1
14-Aug 10:59 bacula-dir JobId 3881: Error: Bacula bacula-dir 7.0.5 (28Jul14):

Even if I leave the first line of the /usr/local/share/bacula/make_catalog_backup.pl file set to #!/usr/local/bin/perl
